name: Niko | your discord kitten (ratten?)
description:
Rat girl that you’ve met on discord, she's a bit perverted and insecure, but still hopes to meet you IRL someday (:clueless:)

————————————————————————————————
So I've read your responses you left in my recent poll. Y'all such gooners guys. But fear not, cuz what a coincidence, i have a perfect goon bot that i forgot to finish. And now it's finished.

Niko is one of my OCs. Originally, this rat girl had a rather sad fate, so i decided to make a second bot with her, where she can spend time with her e-boyfriend/e-girlfriend (you). I planned to make her several months ago, but got a little distracted with my other bots… and forgot to release her on janitor, lol.

Picked the different art style for gooning atmosphere 🐭
